title: Fluted Panel Series
shortDescription: Transform your space with premium 9mm WPC fluted panels. Give your TV unit and living room a luxury 3D wooden look that is 100% waterproof and termite-proof.
longDescription:
Elevate your interior design with the Goals Floors WPC Fluted Panel collection. If you want to give your TV unit, master bedroom wall, or office reception a premium 3D wooden look, these panels are the ultimate choice.

Unlike cheap, hollow PVC panels, our 9mm thick WPC (Wood Plastic Composite) panels are solid, highly durable, 100% waterproof, and completely termite-proof. They require absolutely no painting or polishing. Engineered with a precision tongue-and-groove interlocking system, they fit together seamlessly, leaving no visible joints on your wall.

Trusted by top architects and interior designers across Delhi NCR for luxury projects. Available in stunning Wood, Metallic, and Designer finishes, these panels provide a flawless and expensive architectural look to any space.

features.title: Premium 9mm Thickness
features.description: Highly strong and durable. Significantly more robust and impact-resistant than standard, hollow PVC panels.

features.title: 100% Moisture Proof
features.description: Zero water absorption. Completely safe from wall dampness and moisture, ensuring your walls remain pristine in all weather conditions.

features.title: Termite & Borer Shield
features.description: The advanced WPC material is completely immune to termites and wood-boring insects, offering lifetime structural safety.

features.title: Ready to Use (No Painting)
features.description: Comes pre-finished with premium scratch-resistant wooden and metallic textures. Saves you the time and cost of messy paint jobs.

features.title: Seamless Interlock System
features.description: The smart interlocking mechanism completely hides the joints and fixing nails, delivering a clean, continuous architectural look.

features.title: Maintenance Free
features.description: Very easy to clean. Dust settling in the grooves can be easily removed with a dry microfiber cloth or a vacuum brush.

installation: Designed for rapid and clean installation. The panels smoothly interlock with each other and are mounted directly onto flat walls or a plywood base using heavy-duty PU adhesive and concealed brad nails. The seamless joint system ensures a flawless finish with no visible hardware.
maintenance: Maintenance is incredibly simple. Use a standard feather duster or a vacuum cleaner with a soft brush attachment to keep the flutes (grooves) free of dust. For minor marks, wiping with a slightly damp microfiber cloth is sufficient.

faqs.question: Why should I choose Cobra WPC panels over cheaper PVC panels?
faqs.answer: Cheap PVC panels are hollow, brittle, and can break easily upon impact. Cobra WPC panels are solid, heavy, and highly durable. Their authentic wood grain texture looks far more premium and realistic than standard plastic panels.

faqs.question: Can I install these panels behind my TV unit?
faqs.answer: Yes, this is one of their most popular applications. The fluted design creates a stunning, luxurious backdrop for modern TVs and effortlessly hides unsightly wiring behind the panel framework.

faqs.question: Do I need to paint or polish these panels after installation?
faqs.answer: No. The Cobra WPC Fluted Panels are pre-finished with high-quality, scratch-resistant textures. They are ready to use right out of the box, saving you the hassle and cost of on-site painting.

faqs.question: Can these panels be installed directly on a damp wall (seelan)?
faqs.answer: While the WPC material itself is 100% waterproof, the adhesive needs a dry surface to bond properly. For actively damp walls, we highly recommend installing a thin aluminum or plywood grid over the wall first.

faqs.question: Are these panels safe from termites (deemak)?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. WPC (Wood Plastic Composite) is completely immune to termites and borers. Unlike natural wood, insects cannot eat or damage this material.

faqs.question: Will the joints be visible after installation?
faqs.answer: No. Our panels feature a precision tongue-and-groove interlocking profile. When installed correctly, one panel slides into the next, completely hiding the joint and the fixing nails.

faqs.question: How do you clean the dust that settles in the grooves?
faqs.answer: Cleaning is very simple. You can use a standard feather duster, a dry microfiber cloth, or a vacuum cleaner with a soft brush nozzle to quickly remove any dust from the flutes.

faqs.question: Do you provide matching edge trims for corners?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors provides a complete ecosystem. We supply matching WPC L-profiles and U-trims in the exact same shades to ensure the edges and corners of your walls have a flawless, professional finish.

faqs.question: What is the difference between the Curve and Wave designs?
faqs.answer: The 'Curve' profile features deep, semi-circular flutes for a bold, traditional louvered look. The 'Wave' profile has softer, shallower curves for a more subtle, contemporary aesthetic.

faqs.question: Do you supply the Cobra series in bulk for commercial projects in Delhi NCR?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is a preferred B2B supplier for architects and interior contractors across Delhi NCR. We offer dedicated project pricing and rapid site delivery for bulk orders.

installationSteps.title: Prepare the Wall
points: The wall must be flat, clean, and free of dust or grease.
Ensure the surface is completely dry for maximum adhesive grip.
installationSteps.tip: For best results on uneven walls, install over a thin plywood frame or directly onto leveled plastered walls.

installationSteps.title: Measure & Cut
points: Measure the wall height and cut the panels accurately using a fine-tooth saw.
Ensure all cuts are perfectly straight at a 90-degree angle for a seamless fit.

installationSteps.title: Apply Adhesive
points: Apply the adhesive in a zig-zag pattern on the back of the panel.
Keep the glue at least 1 inch away from the edges to prevent it from squeezing out.

installationSteps.title: Lock & Secure
points: Slide the edge of the panel into the groove of the previously installed panel.
Press firmly against the wall and hold for a few seconds.
Secure the interlocking lip with concealed brad nails for extra strength.
